staticWebApp.name: [variables('staticWebAppName')]
staticWebApp.properties: [union(createObject('buildProperties', createObject('appLocation', parameters('appLocation'), 'outputLocation', parameters('outputLocation')), 'stagingEnvironmentPolicy', if(parameters('stagingEnabled'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled'), 'allowConfigFileUpdates', parameters('allowConfigUpdates'), 'provider', parameters('provider'), 'enterpriseGradeCdnStatus', if(parameters('enterpriseCdn'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled')), if(not(equals(parameters('repositoryUrl'), '')), createObject('repositoryUrl', parameters('repositoryUrl'), 'branch', parameters('branch')), createObject()))]

parameters.allowedOrigin: [if(parameters('enableFrontDoor'), if(not(equals(parameters('frontDoorCustomDomain'), '')), createObject('value', format('https://{0}', parameters('frontDoorCustomDomain'))), createObject('value', format('https://{0}', reference('frontDoor').outputs.endpointHostname.value))), createObject('value', format('https://{0}', reference('staticWebApp').outputs.defaultHostname.value)))]

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'API_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'LOG_LEVEL', 'value', 'info'), createObject('name', 'SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'ALLOWED_ORIGIN', 'value', parameters('allowedOrigin')), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_URL', 'value', format('postgresql://{0}:{1}@{2}:5432/{3}?sslmode=require', parameters('databaseUser'), parameters('databasePassword'), parameters('databaseHost'), parameters('databaseName')))), if(not(equals(parameters('storageAccountName'), '')), createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME', 'value', parameters('storageAccountName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME', 'value', 'files')), createArray()), if(parameters('enableAzureAuth'), createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_EXTERNAL_TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('azureAuthExternalTenantId')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_API_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('azureAuthClientId')), createObject('name', 'AUTH_PROVIDER', 'value', 'easy-auth')), createArray()))]
